title: Product Agreement Term and Condition
description:
Negotiated Terms and Conditions for a sold banking product refer to customized or mutually agreed-upon modifications to the standard terms that are tailored to an individual customer, typically based on their profile, relationship, risk, or volume of business.

Custom/agreed terms tailored for a specific customer during or after the sale.

Comment:
- Applies only to the individual customer for whom the deal is negotiated.
- Approval required: Requires case-by-case approval by credit, risk, or senior management.
- Documented in offer letter, term sheet, sanction letter, or custom agreement.

x-relationships.description: Inherits from Agreement Term and Condition
